chunks.text: Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2017 - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2017 Brains and Machines: AI, Robotics and Neural Computation at Berkeley This year’s BEARS promises to present exciting and innovative research centered on artificial intelligence and human-centric computing. We have reached maximum capacity. Registration is now closed. Thursday, February 9, 2017 General Session: 8:45 am – Noon; Panel Discussion: 1pm Chevron Auditorium, International House 2299 Piedmont Avenue, UC Berkeley Directions Questions?
